name: Buddy Home Context Loader
description: A deterministic Buddy Home reader that turns selected Buddy Home files into an auditable context_package with source refs, authority boundaries, budget metadata, and warnings.

inputSchema.name: Buddy Home Selection
inputSchema.description: Local folder selection envelope for Buddy Home files.

outputSchema.name: Buddy Home Context Report
outputSchema.description: Selected files, budget, source refs, and warnings.
